message:
Add bd-36he epic for Dashboard UI fixes with 26 tasks

Created comprehensive epic to fix UI glitches identified from screenshot:
- 3 core fixes: view caching, lipgloss.Width(), WindowSizeMsg handling
- 14 specific bug fixes: duplicate renders, status bar, list items, etc.
- 4 infrastructure: debug mode, shared styles, animation tick, help component
- 2 tests: unit tests and VHS-based E2E visual regression
- 3 accessibility: NO_COLOR, TERM=dumb, --no-tui flag

Added inter-task dependencies based on Charmbracelet best practices:
- Duplication fixes depend on view caching (bd-1xoe)
- Width fixes depend on lipgloss.Width (bd-1ay2)
- Layout fixes depend on WindowSizeMsg (bd-3v69)
- Animation sync depends on global tick (bd-r9fy)
- E2E tests depend on unit tests

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
